portfolio.title: Quizmaster
portfolio.description: Ett quiz med olika kategorier byggt med JavaScript, HTML och CSS som en Single Page Application.
portfolio.descriptionEn: A quiz app with multiple categories built with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS as a Single Page Application.

portfolio.title: Hittarecept
portfolio.description: En receptapp byggd med React, Tailwind CSS, React Router och MealDB API.
portfolio.descriptionEn: A recipe app built with React, Tailwind CSS, React Router, and the MealDB API.

portfolio.title: Konnect ChatApp
portfolio.description: En modern chattapp byggd med React, Vite och Tailwind CSS med API-anrop, CRUD och sessionshantering.
portfolio.descriptionEn: A modern chat app built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS with API requests, CRUD, and session handling.

portfolio.title: Namngivelse inbjudan
portfolio.description: Responsiv webbplats byggd i React och Vite med Tailwind CSS samt OSA-formulär via Formspree.
portfolio.descriptionEn: Responsive website built with React and Vite using Tailwind CSS and an RSVP form powered by Formspree.
